headlines.description: — Brock Purdy promised his San Francisco 49ers teammates he would have fun and celebrate if he scored during Sunday's game against the Cleveland Browns.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brock Purdy leads 49ers to 26-8 victory over Browns, spoiling Shedeur Sanders' home debut

headlines.description: — The Jacksonville Jaguars are showing how quickly a franchise can turn around in a coach's first season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trevor Lawrence leads Jaguars to third straight win in 25-3 victory over the Titans

headlines.description: — C.J. Stroud provided a glimpse of what Houston could look like in December and January if he stays healthy.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans corral high-scoring Colts and narrow AFC South race with 20-16 win at Indy

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — When the Miami Dolphins needed a big play on Sunday, their defense delivered.
headlines.shortLinkText: Achane rushes for 134 yards and a TD to help Dolphins edge Saints 21-17 for 3rd straight win

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Nick Folk had already atoned for his first field goal miss of the season. With the game on the line, he kicked the New York Jets to a comeback victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nick Folk's 56-yard field goal on final play lifts Jets to 27-24 win over Falcons

events.name: Arizona Cardinals at Tampa Bay Buccaneers
Los Angeles Rams at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Bryce Young's teammates say he never wavers in pressure situations.
headlines.shortLinkText: Young throws 3 TDs, Panthers turn over Stafford 3 times to end Rams' 6-game win streak, 31-28

headlines.description: — Ahead of the season, Ernest Jones IV set a goal of finishing the year with six interceptions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks blank Vikings 26-0 for their 1st shutout victory in 10 years

headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills came to Pittsburgh looking for something — anything, really — to snap themselves out of a midseason lull that had robbed them of their swagger, not to mention their usual grip on first place in the AFC East.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen sets career mark for rushing TDs by a QB as the Bills mash the reeling Steelers 26-7

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert broke a bone in his non-throwing hand during the Los Angeles Chargers' first offensive series Sunday. After covering it with a hard cast and a white glove, he spent the rest of the afternoon exclusively taking shotgun snaps and...
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert throws 2 TD passes despite hand injury, Chargers send Raiders to 6th straight loss, 31-14

headlines.description: — Nik Bonitto batted away Marcus Mariota’s pass in overtime to deny Washington a winning 2-point conversion, and the Denver Broncos held on for their ninth straight victory, a 27-26 thriller...
headlines.shortLinkText: Nik Bonitto bats away 2-point try in OT and Broncos escape with 27-26 win over Commanders
